audit_findings.finding: JSON.stringify(result).slice(0, 6000) splits UTF-16 surrogate pairs producing illegal strings; silent JSON structure corruption with no truncation marker
audit_findings.remediation: Replace with Array.from()-based codepoint-aware slice + append '…[truncated]' marker when truncated
